input.prompt:
My EditProductPage has a form with unsaved changes. I need to:
1. Show a confirmation dialog when the user tries to navigate back
2. Cancel navigation if they choose to stay
3. Also provide a custom back button that says "Cancel" instead of the
   default back arrow.
How do I implement this in .NET MAUI Shell?
